templates.name: FICA Reminder (7 days)
templates.description: Notifies the assigned member when a new client has not started FICA verification after 7 days

actionConfig.title: FICA not started: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.message: Client {{customer.name}} was created 7 days ago and FICA verification has not been started. Please initiate the FICA/KYC process.

templates.name: Engagement Budget Alert (80%)
templates.description: Notifies the owner when an engagement budget reaches 80% consumption

actionConfig.title: Budget alert: {{project.name}} at 80%
actionConfig.message: The engagement {{project.name}} for {{customer.name}} has consumed 80% of its budget. Review time logged and consider whether scope or budget needs adjustment.

templates.name: Invoice Overdue (30 days)
templates.description: Notifies the admin/bookkeeper when an invoice is overdue for 30 days

actionConfig.title: Invoice overdue: {{invoice.invoiceNumber}}
actionConfig.message: Invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}} for {{customer.name}} (R{{invoice.total}}) is now overdue. Please follow up with the client for payment.

actionConfig.subject: Payment reminder: Invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}}
actionConfig.body:
Dear {{customer.name}},

This is a friendly reminder that invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}} dated {{invoice.date}} for the amount of R{{invoice.total}} is now overdue.

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience. If payment has already been made, please disregard this notice.

Kind regards,
{{org.name}}

templates.name: SARS Deadline Reminder
templates.description: Notifies org admins when a SARS submission deadline is approaching (14, 7, and 1 day before)

actionConfig.title: SARS deadline approaching: {{field.label}} for {{entity.name}}
actionConfig.message: The {{field.label}} for {{entity.name}} is in {{field.daysUntil}} day(s). Please ensure all submissions are prepared and filed on time.
